notes: v343 — TOP 20 IS NOW A SINGLE-COLUMN LADDER. You preferred them listed under each other like a ladder rather than in a grid, so that's how it is now: one clean vertical column, ranked 1 to 20, each share on its own compact line — rank, code, a score bar, the score out of 10, the band, and the ☆ to add it to a watchlist. Each line's full breakdown (accumulation days, streaks, momentum) shows when you hover it, to keep the rows tidy. Because the rows are compact now, about fifteen fit on screen at once (it was only four before), with the rest a short scroll away — and on a taller window or full screen you'll see all twenty. Hard-refresh to load v343. ALSO RECENT — v342 — fixed the table's colour seam (the frozen Ticker column no longer looks a different shade to the rest). ALSO RECENT — v341 — checked the maths and upgraded RSI to Wilder's standard. ALSO RECENT — v340 — the 📊 Range column is back. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
